name: Transformalize.Batches.Sqlite
description: Batch Create and Batch Write Tasks Needed for Bulk Actions.
author: Dale Newman

Arrangement.Text:
<cfg name="Batch Create" read-only="true" mode="@[Mode]">
 
  <parameters>
    <add name="Mode" value="default" />
    <add name="Created" t="now().format({Created:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff})" />
    <add name="UserId" />
    <add name="UserName" />
    <add name="ReportContentItemId" />
    <add name="ReportTitle" />
    <add name="TaskContentItemId" />
    <add name="TaskTitle" />
    <add name="Description" />
  </parameters>
  
  <connections>
    <add name="db" provider="sqlite" file="App_Data/batches.db" />
  </connections>
  
  <entities>
    <add name="Script" 
         connection="db" 
         query="
                  INSERT INTO Batch(Id,Created,UserId,UserName,ReportContentItemId,ReportTitle,TaskContentItemId,TaskTitle,Description,BatchStatusId,Message)
                  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Id),0)+1,@Created,@UserId,@UserName,@ReportContentItemId,@ReportTitle,@TaskContentItemId,@TaskTitle,@Description,1,'' FROM Batch;
                
                  SELECT b.Id AS BatchId
                  FROM Batch b
                  WHERE UserId = @UserId
                  ORDER BY b.Id DESC
                  LIMIT 1
                  ">
      <fields>
          <add name="BatchId" type="long" primary-key="true" />
      </fields>
    </add>
  </entities>
</cfg>

<cfg name="Batch" mode="@[Mode]">

  <!-- note this has to be run once in init mode to create the transformalize tables and views -->

  <parameters>
    <add name="BatchId" type="int" value="0" />
    <add name="Mode" value="default" />
  </parameters>

  <connections>
    <add name="input" provider="internal" />
    <add name="output" provider="sqlite" file="App_Data/batches.db" />
  </connections>
  
  <entities>
    <add name="Record" update="false">
      <rows>
        <!-- OrchardCore.Transformalize will insert rows here -->
      </rows>
      <fields>
        <add input="false" name="BatchId" type="int" default="@[BatchId]" primary-key="true" />
        <!-- currently this last field is used to store the batch values -->
        <add name="BatchValue" length="255" primary-key="true" />
      </fields>
    </add>
  </entities>

  <actions>
    <add name="Create" 
         type="run" 
         connection="output"
         description="Create the batch tables in init mode."
         mode="init"
         command="
                  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS BatchStatus (
                    Id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
                    Status TEXT NOT NULL
                  );

                  INSERT INTO BatchStatus(Id,Status) SELECT 1, 'Waiting' WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM BatchStatus WHERE Id = 1);
                  INSERT INTO BatchStatus(Id,Status) SELECT 2, 'Running' WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM BatchStatus WHERE Id = 2);
                  INSERT INTO BatchStatus(Id,Status) SELECT 3, 'Completed' WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM BatchStatus WHERE Id = 3);
                  INSERT INTO BatchStatus(Id,Status) SELECT 4, 'Failed' WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM BatchStatus WHERE Id = 4);

                  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'Batch' (
                    Id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
                    Created TEXT NOT NULL,
                    UserId INTEGER NOT NULL,
                    Username TEXT NOT NULL,
                    ReportContentItemId TEXT NOT NULL,
                    ReportTitle TEXT NOT NULL,
                    TaskContentItemId TEXT NOT NULL,
                    TaskTitle TEXT NOT NULL,
                    Description TEXT NOT NULL,
                    BatchStatusId INTEGER,
                    Message TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (BatchStatusId) REFERENCES BatchStatus(Id)
                  );
                  
                  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS IX_Batch_BatchStatusId ON 'Batch'(BatchStatusId);             
                  " />
  </actions>

</cfg>

<cfg name="Batch Success SQLite">
 
  <parameters>
    <add name="BatchId" type="long" value="0" />
    <add name="RecordsAffected" type="int" value="0" />
  </parameters>
  
  <connections>
    <add name="db" provider="sqlite" file="App_Data/batches.db" />
  </connections>
  
  <actions>
    <add name="Create" 
         type="run" 
         connection="db" 
         command="UPDATE Batch 
                  SET BatchStatusId = 3,
                      Message = @RecordsAffected || ' Records Affected'
                  WHERE Id = @BatchId;" />
  </actions>

</cfg>

<cfg name="Batch Fail">
 
  <parameters>
    <add name="BatchId" type="long" value="0" />
    <add name="RecordsAffected" type="int" value="0" />
    <add name="Message" value="" invalid-characters="" />
  </parameters>
  
  <connections>
    <add name="db" provider="sqlite" file="App_Data/batches.db" />
  </connections>
  
  <actions>
    <add name="Create" type="run" connection="db" 
         command="UPDATE Batch 
                  SET BatchStatusId = 4,
                      Message = @RecordsAffected || ' Records Affected. ' || @Message
                  WHERE Id = @BatchId;" />
  </actions>

</cfg>
